name: @quoin/vocab-forms
description: Form primitives — field, label, help text, error, select, checkbox, radio, textarea, fieldset, submit row.

attribution.sourceSystem: Quoin original — distilled from form patterns across shadcn/ui, Headless UI, Radix UI, and WCAG-conformant form examples.
attribution.harvestNotes: Extends the v1 input-cell primitive with the surrounding form scaffolding most apps need.
